ast.target: 未找到有意义的文件夹进行分析。请先在您的保险库中创建一些文件夹。

ast.name: body
body
body
content
ast.source: You are a helpful assistant that summarizes content accurately and thoroughly.
ast.target: 你是一个乐于助人的助手，能够准确且全面地总结内容。

ast.name: content
ast.source: You are a text-to-speech engine. Read the user message aloud exactly as written, verbatim, with natural pacing. Do not add, omit, summarize, or comment.
ast.target: 你是一个文本转语音引擎。请逐字朗读用户消息，保持自然的节奏。不要添加、省略、总结或评论。

ast.name: content
ast.source: You are a transcription engine. Transcribe the audio verbatim. Output ONLY the transcript text — no preamble, no commentary.
ast.target: 你是一个转录引擎。请逐字转录音频。只输出转录文本——不要前言，不要评论。

ast.name: content
ast.source: You are a helpful assistant that summarizes content accurately and concisely.
ast.target: 你是一个乐于助人的助手，能够准确且简洁地总结内容。

ast.name: content
ast.source:
---
name: Notes Dashboard
description: AI-processed notes with summaries and metadata
filters: 'property.status == "processed"'
columns:
  - property.name
  - property.summary
  - property.persona
  - property.type
  - property.tags
  - property.processed
ast.target:
---
name: 笔记仪表板
description: 经过AI处理的笔记，包含摘要和元数据
filters: 'property.status == "processed"'
columns:
  - property.name
  - property.summary
  - property.persona
  - property.type
  - property.tags
  - property.processed

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Turn features on or off. Disabling one hides its commands, settings, and views — reload Obsidian to apply command and view changes.
ast.target: 开启或关闭功能。禁用某项功能会隐藏其命令、设置和视图——重新加载Obsidian以应用命令和视图更改。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Core LLM provider and API key configuration.
ast.target: 核心LLM提供商和API密钥配置。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: AI tag generation and the tag network.

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Free-form AI chat with attachments and projects.
ast.target: 支持附件和项目的自由形式AI聊天。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Summarize URLs, PDFs, YouTube, and audio.

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Translate notes and sources into other languages.
ast.target: 将笔记和来源翻译成其他语言。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Improve notes, integrate pending content, highlight chat.
ast.target: 改进笔记，整合待处理内容，高亮聊天。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Generate slide decks from a note.

ast.name: desc
ast.target: 结构化会议记录和音频转录。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Convert a note to a spoken-audio MP3.

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Find notes by meaning; powers RAG and related notes.
ast.target: 按含义查找笔记；为RAG和相关笔记提供支持。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Make figures and charts in linked PDFs searchable. Sends PDF page images to the configured embedding service (Azure or Cohere).
ast.target: 使链接PDF中的图表可搜索。将PDF页面图像发送到配置的嵌入服务（Azure或Cohere）。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Triage web articles linked in a note.
ast.target: 对笔记中链接的网络文章进行分类。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Fast one-paragraph triage of embedded sources.
ast.target: 对嵌入式来源进行快速的一段式分类。

ast.name: desc
ast.target: 调查、上下文和集群画布。

ast.name: desc
ast.target: 数字化手写、图表和白板。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Sync Kindle highlights into the vault.

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Export notes as a NotebookLM source pack.

ast.name: desc
ast.target: 结构化元数据和仪表板。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Export notes as PDF, Word, or PowerPoint.

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Vault hygiene scan for embedded assets.
ast.target: 对嵌入式资产进行库卫生扫描。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Run models offline with ollama. We recommend qwen 3.5 9b (6.6 gb, multimodal, 201 languages).
ast.target: 使用ollama离线运行模型。我们推荐qwen 3.5 9b（6.6 gb，多模态，201种语言）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Add references and pending integration sections after AI commands
ast.target: 在AI命令后添加参考文献和待整合部分

ast.name: description
ast.source: Generate structured meeting minutes from transcripts.
ast.target: 从转录生成结构化会议记录。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Import and manage your kindle highlights and notes.
ast.target: 导入和管理您的Kindle高亮和笔记。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Choose how each specialist feature runs on Azure: use an Azure deployment, bring your own provider, or turn it off. Features your Azure can't serve are shown so you're never left guessing.
ast.target: 选择每个专业功能在Azure上的运行方式：使用Azure部署、使用您自己的提供商或将其关闭。您的Azure无法服务的功能会显示出来，让您心中有数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: In-region speech services (voice + speaker-separating transcription). Configure region, key, and a voice to upgrade audio from the Global-Standard Whisper path.
ast.target: 区域内语音服务（语音+说话人分离转录）。配置区域、密钥和语音，以从全球标准Whisper路径升级音频。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Find figures and charts inside linked PDFs by meaning. Pages with images or diagrams are embedded so a text search can retrieve them.
ast.target: 通过含义查找链接PDF中的图表。包含图像或图表的页面会被嵌入，以便文本搜索可以检索到它们。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Match exports to your brand colours, font, and layout.
ast.target: 将导出与您的品牌颜色、字体和布局相匹配。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Find related notes by meaning, not just keywords.
ast.target: 按含义而非仅关键词查找相关笔记。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Find related notes and use vault content in AI responses
ast.target: 查找相关笔记并在AI响应中使用库内容

ast.name: description
ast.source: OpenAI for best quality, ollama for offline
ast.target: OpenAI提供最佳质量，ollama用于离线

ast.name: description
ast.target: 留空则使用提供商默认值

ast.name: description
ast.source: May differ from your main AI key
ast.target: 可能与您的主AI密钥不同

ast.name: description
ast.source: Index notes when created or modified
ast.target: 在创建或修改时索引笔记

ast.name: description
ast.source: Also extract and index text from a note's Office documents (docx, xlsx, pptx, txt, rtf, csv). The extracted text is sent to your embedding provider. PDFs are not included yet.
ast.target: 同时从笔记的Office文档（docx、xlsx、pptx、txt、rtf、csv）中提取并索引文本。提取的文本会发送到您的嵌入提供商。PDF暂不包含在内。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Maximum characters of attachment text indexed per note (1000–1000000). Higher values cost more embedding tokens.
ast.target: 每篇笔记索引的最大附件文本字符数（1000–1000000）。值越高，消耗的嵌入令牌越多。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Use same excluded folders as tagging
ast.target: 使用与标签相同的排除文件夹

ast.name: description
ast.target: 要跳过的文件夹（每行一个）

ast.name: description
ast.target: 每个块的字符数（默认值：2000）

ast.name: description
ast.target: 每篇笔记的限制（默认值：10）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Use vault content in AI responses

ast.name: description
ast.source: Add note titles and paths to context
ast.target: 将笔记标题和路径添加到上下文

ast.name: description
ast.source: Number of related notes to display in sidebar and modal (1-50)
ast.target: 在侧边栏和模态框中显示的相关笔记数量（1-50）

ast.name: description
ast.target: 移动设备特定的性能和网络设置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Configure integrations with external tools and plugins.
ast.target: 配置与外部工具和插件的集成。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Configure structured metadata for Obsidian bases dashboards. These settings control how AI organiser adds metadata properties to your notes.
ast.target: 为Obsidian基础仪表板配置结构化元数据。这些设置控制AI组织者如何为您的笔记添加元数据属性。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Export notes as word (.docx) or PowerPoint (.pptx) files.

ast.name: description
ast.source: Fetch newsletters from gmail and create AI-summarized digests in your vault.
ast.target: 从Gmail获取新闻通讯，并在您的库中创建AI摘要的摘要。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Generate spoken-audio mp3 files of your notes.

ast.name: description
ast.source: Optional LLM pre-pass that summarises diagrams, large tables, and expands acronyms before narration
ast.target: 可选的LLM预处理，用于在叙述前总结图表、大型表格并展开缩写

ast.name: description
ast.source: Export Obsidian notes as sanitized source packs for NotebookLM.
ast.target: 将Obsidian笔记导出为经过清理的NotebookLM源包。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Some features require specific AI providers. Configure dedicated API keys here — they inherit from your main provider when possible.
ast.target: 某些功能需要特定的AI提供商。在此处配置专用API密钥——在可能的情况下，它们会继承自您的主提供商。

ast.name: description
ast.source: YouTube videos are processed using gemini's native video understanding, which is more reliable than transcript scraping.
ast.target: YouTube视频使用Gemini的原生视频理解进行处理，这比转录抓取更可靠。

ast.name: description
ast.source: PDF summarization requires multimodal AI models (claude or gemini). If your main provider does not support PDFs, configure a dedicated provider here.
ast.target: PDF摘要需要多模态AI模型（Claude或Gemini）。如果您的主提供商不支持PDF，请在此处配置专用提供商。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Audio files are transcribed using whisper API (OpenAI or groq). Requires an API key from either provider.
ast.target: 音频文件使用Whisper API（OpenAI或groq）进行转录。需要来自任一提供商的API密钥。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Convert images (handwritten notes, diagrams, whiteboards) into structured Markdown using vision language models.
ast.target: 使用视觉语言模型将图像（手写笔记、图表、白板）转换为结构化Markdown。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Node size represents tag frequency. Connections represent tags that appear together in notes.
ast.target: 节点大小代表标签频率。连接代表在笔记中一起出现的标签。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Choose a PDF from the attachments folder to summarize
ast.target: 从附件文件夹中选择一个PDF进行总结

ast.name: description
ast.source: Content is {length} characters ({percentage}% of limit of {max}). Choose how to handle:
ast.target: 内容长度为{length}个字符（占{max}限制的{percentage}%）。选择处理方式：

ast.name: description
ast.source: You are about to send content to {provider} for summarization.
ast.target: 您即将向{provider}发送内容以进行总结。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Select the target language for translation. The entire note content will be translated.
ast.target: 选择翻译的目标语言。整个笔记内容将被翻译。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Select sources to summarize. The AI will synthesize content from all selected sources.
ast.target: 选择要总结的来源。AI将综合所有选定来源的内容。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Choose a root folder to constrain AI suggestions within your organizational structure.
ast.target: 选择一个根文件夹，将AI建议限制在您的组织结构内。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Build, update, or clear your semantic search index.
ast.target: 构建、更新或清除您的语义搜索索引。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The AI has suggested the following title and folder for this note. Select which suggestions to apply.
ast.target: AI已为此笔记建议了以下标题和文件夹。选择要应用的建议。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Choose a writing style for this AI operation.
ast.target: 为此AI操作选择一种写作风格。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Ask a question or request an improvement to your note.
ast.target: 提出一个问题或请求对您的笔记进行改进。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Describe what kind of resources you're looking for.
ast.target: 描述您正在寻找的资源类型。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Click a link to open it, or copy the URL to add to your note.
ast.target: 点击链接打开它，或复制URL以添加到您的笔记中。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Choose an audio file to transcribe. Files over 25mb will be compressed automatically.
ast.target: 选择要转录的音频文件。超过25MB的文件将自动压缩。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Create a visual diagram from your note content. Obsidian will automatically render Mermaid diagrams.
ast.target: 从您的笔记内容创建可视化图表。Obsidian将自动渲染Mermaid图表。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Generate flashcards from the current note and export to your preferred format.
ast.target: 从当前笔记生成抽认卡，并导出为您首选的格式。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Notes semantically similar to the current note based on meaning and content.
ast.target: 基于含义和内容，与当前笔记在语义上相似的笔记。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Search your vault by meaning, not just keywords. Finds conceptually related content.
ast.target: 通过含义而非仅关键词搜索您的知识库。查找概念上相关的内容。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Choose how to export selected notes
ast.target: 选择如何导出选定的笔记

ast.name: description
ast.source: Select dashboard templates to create .base files for Obsidian bases integration.
ast.target: 选择仪表板模板，为Obsidian bases集成创建.base文件。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Review selection and configure export settings for NotebookLM.
ast.target: 审阅选择并配置NotebookLM的导出设置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The AI will merge your pending content into the main note by topic.
ast.target: AI将按主题将您待处理的内容合并到主笔记中。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Just paste or type anything - text, URLs, notes. The AI will organize it during integration.
ast.target: 只需粘贴或输入任何内容——文本、网址、笔记。AI将在集成过程中对其进行组织。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Paste a URL. Use "summarize URL" command first if you want to fetch and summarize the content.
ast.target: 粘贴一个网址。如果您想获取并总结内容，请先使用“总结网址”命令。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Import highlights from your kindle. Choose a my clippings.txt file from your device.
ast.target: 从您的Kindle导入高亮内容。从您的设备中选择一个my clippings.txt文件。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Chat with AI to create or refine a Mermaid diagram
ast.target: 与AI聊天以创建或优化Mermaid图表

ast.name: description
ast.source: Limit vault search to a specific folder and its subfolders
ast.target: 将知识库搜索限制在特定文件夹及其子文件夹中

ast.name: description
ast.source: SVG could not be sanitized; omitted from HTML.
ast.target: SVG无法被净化；已从HTML中省略。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 渐变图像失败；回退为纯色填充。

ast.name: description
ast.source: native chart unavailable; rendered as shapes.
ast.target: 原生图表不可用；渲染为形状。

ast.name: description
ast.source: native line chart unavailable; rendered as a summary.
ast.target: 原生折线图不可用；渲染为摘要。

ast.name: description
ast.source: custom block rendered as placeholder (no rasterizer).
ast.target: 自定义块渲染为占位符（无光栅化器）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Top-tier 9B model. Multimodal, 201 languages, tool use. Best bang-for-buck local model.
ast.target: 顶级9B模型。多模态，支持201种语言，工具使用。性价比最高的本地模型。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Near frontier-model performance. Excellent reasoning and coding.
ast.target: 接近前沿模型的性能。卓越的推理和编码能力。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Meta's latest. Strong instruction following and tool use.
ast.target: Meta的最新模型。强大的指令遵循和工具使用能力。

ast.name: description
ast.source: State-of-the-art reasoning model. Excellent for complex tasks.
ast.target: 最先进的推理模型。非常适合复杂任务。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Compact but powerful. Multimodal, tool use, thinking. Great for 8GB machines.
ast.target: 紧凑但强大。多模态，工具使用，思考能力。非常适合8GB内存的机器。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 谷歌的模型。强大的指令遵循能力。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Microsoft's model. Excellent for reasoning and math.
ast.target: 微软的模型。非常适合推理和数学。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Fast and reliable. Proven track record.

ast.name: description
ast.source: Tiny but capable. Good for low-RAM systems or quick tasks.
ast.target: 小巧但能干。适用于低内存系统或快速任务。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 轻量级。适用于较旧的机器。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Best local embedding model. 768 dimensions. Recommended.
ast.target: 最佳本地嵌入模型。768维。推荐。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Tiny and fast. 384 dimensions. Good for limited hardware.
ast.target: 小巧快速。384维。适用于有限硬件。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Best local vision model. Image+video understanding, OCR.
ast.target: 最佳本地视觉模型。图像+视频理解，OCR。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Vision model. Can analyze images and PDFs.
ast.target: 视觉模型。可以分析图像和PDF。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Smaller vision model for basic image understanding.
ast.target: 用于基本图像理解的较小视觉模型。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Audio files in this note are shown first; switch to "All vault files" to browse the rest.
ast.target: 此笔记中的音频文件会优先显示；切换到“所有知识库文件”以浏览其余内容。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Files in this note are shown first; switch to "All vault files" to browse the rest.
ast.target: 此笔记中的文件会优先显示；切换到“所有知识库文件”以浏览其余内容。

ast.name: description
ast.source: AI chooses the best diagram type

ast.name: description
ast.target: 按时间顺序的事件、历史

ast.name: description
ast.source: A basic top-down flowchart with start and end nodes.
ast.target: 一个基本的自上而下流程图，包含开始和结束节点。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Shows interactions between two parties over time.
ast.target: 显示双方随时间的交互。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Radial mind map around a central topic.
ast.target: 围绕中心主题的辐射状思维导图。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Simple project timeline with sections and tasks.
ast.target: 包含部分和任务的简单项目时间线。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Generate flashcards from the currently open note
ast.target: 从当前打开的笔记生成抽认卡

ast.name: description
ast.source: Select multiple notes and extract core concepts across them
ast.target: 选择多个笔记并从中提取核心概念

ast.name: description
ast.source: Answer multiple choice questions from a screenshot image
ast.target: 从截图图像中回答多项选择题

ast.name: description
ast.source: Traditional question and answer format for learning concepts
ast.target: 用于学习概念的传统问答格式

ast.name: description
ast.source: Exam-style questions with options A, B, C, D for test preparation
ast.target: 带有A、B、C、D选项的考试风格题目，用于备考

ast.name: description

ast.name: placeholder
ast.source:
Paste anything here:
- Text notes
- URLs (https://...)
- File links ([[filename]])
- Screenshots (![[image.png]])
- Any content to integrate later...
ast.target:
在此处粘贴任何内容：
- 文本笔记
- 网址 (https://...)
- 文件链接 ([[文件名]])
- 截图 (![[图片.png]])
- 任何稍后需要整合的内容...

ast.name: placeholder
ast.source: Describe how to change the diagram…

ast.name: placeholder
ast.source: Pick an audio file from your vault…
ast.target: 从您的库中选择一个音频文件…

ast.name: placeholder
ast.source: e.g., "Add more focus on technology" or "Remove business-related themes"
ast.target: 例如，“更关注技术”或“移除商业相关主题”

ast.name: placeholder
ast.source: e.g., "I'm a product manager focused on AI tools and SaaS products. I'm interested in machine learning, user research, and business strategy."
ast.target: 例如，“我是一名专注于AI工具和SaaS产品的产品经理。我对机器学习、用户研究和商业策略感兴趣。”

ast.name: placeholder
ast.source:
Examples:
\u2022 "Add disciplines for personal finance and family organization"
\u2022 "I need more focus on machine learning and data engineering"
\u2022 "Remove business-related disciplines, focus on creative writing"
ast.target:
示例：
• “添加个人理财和家庭管理的学科”
• “我需要更多关注机器学习和数据工程”
• “移除商业相关学科，专注于创意写作”

ast.name: placeholder
ast.source: Add context for AI refinement (e.g., "needs to be more specific" or "combine with data-science")
ast.target: 添加AI优化的上下文（例如，“需要更具体”或“与数据科学结合”）

ast.name: text
ast.source: Preview. Final pptx may have minor layout differences.
ast.target: 预览。最终的pptx文件可能有轻微的布局差异。

ast.name: text

ast.target: 本地转录需要 whisper.cpp。目前，请使用云转录（OpenAI 或 groq）。

ast.name: text
ast.source: [Transcript incomplete] This agenda item was not captured in the available transcript.
ast.target: [记录不完整] 此议程项目在可用记录中未被捕获。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Embedding service not configured. Set an embedding provider and API key in semantic search settings before building.
ast.target: 嵌入服务未配置。请在构建前于语义搜索设置中设置嵌入提供商和API密钥。

ast.name: text
ast.source: AI will suggest additions and refinements to your existing list
ast.target: AI将为您现有的列表建议补充和优化内容

ast.name: text
ast.source: Replace all existing with new AI-generated suggestions
ast.target: 用新的AI生成建议替换所有现有内容

ast.name: text
ast.source: AI scans your folder structure and note titles to suggest improvements
ast.target: AI扫描您的文件夹结构和笔记标题以建议改进

ast.name: text
ast.source: How would you like to start?

ast.name: text
ast.source: Choose how you want to generate suggestions:
ast.target: 选择您希望生成建议的方式：

ast.name: text
ast.source: AI analyzes your vault structure and note titles, then you can refine
ast.target: AI分析您的知识库结构和笔记标题，然后您可以进行优化

ast.name: text
ast.source: Tell the AI about your profession and interests before analysis
ast.target: 在分析前告诉AI您的职业和兴趣

ast.name: text
ast.source: Help the AI understand your needs by describing your profession, interests, or focus areas.
ast.target: 通过描述您的职业、兴趣或重点领域来帮助AI理解您的需求。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Review and edit the suggested disciplines. Click on a name to edit it, or add comments for context.
ast.target: 审阅并编辑建议的学科领域。点击名称进行编辑，或添加评论以提供上下文。

ast.name: text
ast.source: The script template was updated to support two-phase confirmation. Re-copy the template below and re-deploy your Apps Script to ensure newsletters are only marked as read after notes are safely saved.
ast.target: 脚本模板已更新以支持两阶段确认。请重新复制下方模板并重新部署您的Apps Script，以确保仅在笔记安全保存后才将新闻通讯标记为已读。
